title: flemingia lineata
intro: Flemingia lineata, also known as the Horsefly or Stinging Hairplant, is a plant species native to Australia, Asia, and Africa, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Flemingia lineata include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and swelling. Flemingia lineata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to the potential for skin irritation from its stinging hairs.
